summary_lines: The unsoldered board still behaves like the default 0x40 board, which is what we want.
The leftmost-bridge board was not visible in the runtime's 0x40-0x43 scan. That usually means it moved to some other address outside the desired four-address plan.
The second-left-bridge board was not visible in the runtime's 0x40-0x43 scan. That usually means it moved to some other address outside the desired four-address plan.
The third-left-bridge board was not visible in the runtime's 0x40-0x43 scan. That usually means it moved to some other address outside the desired four-address plan.
With all four boards connected, the runtime detected no PCA boards at all.
